elevator_pitch: Supercharge is a pre-funded purchasing platform that buys hard-to-get products on your behalf the moment they come in stock or go on sale. Load your account, set your wishlist, and let Supercharge handle the rest, securing verified, fraud-free transactions with major retailers.
problem: Hot products sell out in minutes, leaving real customers empty-handed while scalpers and bots snap up inventory. Consumers are forced to obsessively refresh pages, set alarms for restocks, and still miss out on limited drops, sales, and high-demand items.
solution: Supercharge lets customers pre-fund an account and queue up the items they want. When products restock or hit a target sale price, Supercharge purchases on their behalf using verified, bot-free transactions. Retailers get guaranteed sales with zero chargebacks, and consumers get the products they actually want without the stress.
target_market: Millennial and Gen-Z consumers who shop for high-demand electronics, sneakers, limited-edition drops, home goods, and trending products. Secondary market includes parents hunting for popular toys, hobbyists tracking niche items, and deal-seekers who want sale alerts with auto-purchase.
revenue_model: Subscription tiers (free tier with limits, premium for unlimited watches and priority purchasing), per-transaction convenience fees (2-5%), interchange revenue on the stored-value accounts, and B2B partnerships with retailers who pay for access to a pool of verified, pre-funded buyers.
key_features: Pre-funded digital wallet with instant purchase capability when items restock
Smart watchlist that monitors stock levels, price drops, and limited releases across retailers
Verified buyer network that eliminates bots and scalpers for retailers
Real-time alerts and auto-buy triggers based on price thresholds and availability
competitive_advantage: Unlike price trackers or wishlist apps, Supercharge holds real funds in escrow and executes purchases instantly. The pre-funded model creates trust with retailers, who benefit from guaranteed fraud-free transactions and can allocate inventory to real customers. This two-sided value proposition builds a defensible network effect.
market_size_estimate: The global e-commerce market exceeds $5 trillion annually. Product resale and secondary markets (sneakers, electronics, collectibles) represent over $30 billion. Even capturing a fraction of high-demand purchasing through convenience fees and subscriptions points to a TAM of $2-5 billion.
go_to_market: Launch with a focus on one vertical, likely sneaker drops and gaming console restocks, where demand vastly outstrips supply. Partner with 2-3 major retailers to demonstrate the verified-buyer value proposition. Build community through social media targeting sneakerheads and gaming enthusiasts.
risks: Retailers may resist third-party purchasing intermediaries or build competing in-house solutions
Regulatory complexity around holding customer funds in escrow across multiple states
Consumer trust barrier: convincing users to pre-load funds into yet another digital wallet
year_one_milestones: Secure partnerships with 3 major retailers and process 50,000 verified purchases
Reach 100,000 active users with $10M in pre-funded account balances
Expand from electronics and sneakers into home goods and limited-edition product categories
startup_cost_range: $500K - $1.5M (payment infrastructure, retailer integrations, compliance, and initial marketing)
